arts.ttl: Man Utd Make Contact to Sign 'Extraordinary' Barcelona Star
arts.sum: Manchester United are among several Premier League clubs interested in Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: 'New development' in Alejandro Garnacho saga as Red Devils 'face major decision'
arts.sum: Napoli reportedly have a £40m offer for Argentina international Alejandro Garnacho turned down by Manchester United.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd v Southampton on TV tonight - kick-off time and channel details
arts.sum: Manchester United host Southampton in the Premier League on Thursday evening as both sides look to bounce back from their recent domestic struggles

arts.ttl: Confirmed Manchester United squad members vs Southampton as Ruben Amorim gets major boost
arts.sum: Man United's players started to arrive at Old Trafford at around 4pm ahead of Thursday night's Premier League clash with Southampton.

arts.ttl: Maguire is Man Utd leader again - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim says former club captain Harry Maguire is "a leader again."

arts.ttl: Man Utd in INSANE transfer links to €80m Liverpool star
arts.sum: While Amorim is eager to bring in a wing-back and a midfielder, United’s struggle for consistency in attack has also left the club seeking another forward, particularly if Rashford, Antony or the misfiring Joshua Zirkzee leave this month. Liverpool would perhaps welcome an exit for Nunez after his struggles since his €85 million transfer from Benfica in 2022, although Arne Slot’s side are understood to have already rejected an approach from Saudi Arabia for the striker this month.

arts.ttl: 'I almost joined Man City from Man Utd – I walked out of the medical to sign for Arsenal'
arts.sum: One former Manchester United star has recounted how he was on the verge of joining bitter rivals City before Arsenal came calling - and he fled his medical to accept the transfer

arts.ttl: Manchester United REJECT £40million Alejandro Garnacho transfer bid
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho's future at Old Trafford is up in the air with the youngster having yet to prove himself to Ruben Amorim and the club looking to sell players to fund reshaping the squad again this month

arts.ttl: Report: With no Bayern Munich agreement yet, agent to shop Alphonso Davies to Real Madrid, Liverpool, Manchester City, Manchester United
arts.sum: The question now is whether Bayern will improve their offer again before the agent leaves, otherwise they run the risk that he could reach an agreement with another club such as Real Madrid Alphonso Davies’ agent will leave Munich tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Manchester United star suspended due to little-known Premier League rule
arts.sum: He served his suspension in the following Premier League game against Brentford, allowing him to return to the squad for the FA Cup semi-final against Coventry. Dalot is one of few players in United squad that appears suited to the demanding position, making the search for a replacement tricky.
